name: io.github.Alexendros/protonsuite-agent
description: Proton Suite Agent · Mail (Bridge IMAP/SMTP) + Pass (pass-cli) + Calendar + Drive · multi-transport stdio + HTTP · agent setup, organization and alerting.

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_PASS
environmentVariables.description: Bridge-generated app password (NOT your Proton account password). Shown by `protonmail-bridge-core --cli` under `info`.

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_MAIL_FROM
environmentVariables.description: From address for outgoing mail. Defaults to PROTON_BRIDGE_USER if unset; set explicitly when the account uses an alias.

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Hostname or IP of the Proton Mail Bridge (default: 127.0.0.1 for local, or container hostname in compose).

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_IMAP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: IMAP port exposed by Proton Mail Bridge (default: 1143).

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_SMTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: SMTP port exposed by Proton Mail Bridge (default: 1025).

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_TLS_INSECURE
environmentVariables.description: Accept Bridge's self-signed localhost cert without validation (default: true). Set to false only if you import Bridge's CA into the trust store.

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_SMTP_SECURITY
environmentVariables.description: SMTP TLS strategy: starttls (default, matches Proton Bridge), implicit (SMTPS/secure port), or plain (no TLS, only for trusted test servers like GreenMail). Leave unset for Bridge.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio (default, local client) or http (advanced remote deployment).

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_DRY_RUN
environmentVariables.description: If true, the agent prints plans without applying changes (default: true). Set to false only after validating the plan manually.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_MAX_INSPECT_EMAILS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum emails inspected during an agent organization pass (default: 1000).

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_MIN_CONFIDENCE
environmentVariables.description: Minimum confidence threshold (0-1) for the agent to accept a classification proposal (default: 0.6).

environmentVariables.name: ALERTS_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable the content alerting subsystem (default: true).

environmentVariables.name: ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional webhook URL that receives JSON POSTs for content/security alerts.

environmentVariables.name: ALERT_MIN_SEVERITY
environmentVariables.description: Minimum severity that triggers file and webhook output: info, warning, alert or critical (default: warning).

environmentVariables.name: ALERT_LOG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for structured alert and audit logs (default: logs).
